chapters.content_preview: chapter 51) of Brihat Parashar Hora Shastra Bombay edition of Shaka 1837.  सुतमदन नवान्ते पूर्ण दृष्टि तपस्य युगल दशम गेहे चार्धं इष्टिं वदन्ति सहज रिचु विपश्यन्पाद दृष्टि मुनीन्द्रा : निजभवनपुपेतो लोचनान्ध : प्रदिष्ट :  i.e. Rahu has full aspect on the house etc located Sth, 7th

chapters.title: Similarly natural malefic planets. lords of houses similarly
chapters.content_preview: 1. Similarly natural malefic planets. lords of houses similarly situated do not give nice results. Planets in general are strong when hey are not in debilitation. eclipsed by Sun or in inimical signs. (2)  लग्नादिभावाद्रिपुरन्श्ररिष्फे पापग्रहास्तद्भवनादिनाथा : | सौम्यास्तु नात्य

chapters.content_preview: chapter 1) & the lord of the Ascendant is strong. the lord of the th house is in its sign of exaltation, the native becomes famous and fortunate.  लगनाधिपोतिबलवाञ्शुभवर्गयुक्त : स्वोच्चे सुहृदगहयुत : स्वनवांशके वा | लग्नाधिनाथसहिते यदि कंद्रनाधे सद्भाग्यकीतिघनघान्यविरायुरेति ।।७२
